project.description: Project to add sandbox deployment for.
project.x-prompt: Which project to add sandbox deployment for?

sandboxProject.description: OpenShift namespace to deploy the sandbox into.
sandboxProject.x-prompt: Which OpenShift namespace should be used for the sandbox?

x-prompt.message: What type of application is the project?

database.description: Database type. A shared containerized instance will be deployed to the sandbox namespace.

accessToken.description: Access token for retrieving configuration from ADSP APIs.

tenant.description: ADSP tenant name. Looks up the realm and does a single login, skipping the interactive tenant picker.

tenantRealm.description: Keycloak realm UUID. Optional when --tenant is provided; overrides the realm looked up from the tenant service.

registry.description: Container registry to publish the sandbox image to (e.g., ghcr.io/my-org). Defaults to the value stored in nx.json, then derived from the git remote. Persisted to nx.json on first use.
